# openwrt_ddns_service (Data Source)

Dynamic DNS (DDNS) service configuration. Each section configures one DDNS record to keep updated via ddns-scripts.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Name of the section. This name is only used when interacting with UCI directly.

### Read-Only

- `cacert` (String) Path to the CA certificate file or directory for TLS verification.
- `check_interval` (Number) How often to check whether an update is needed, expressed in check_unit units.
- `check_unit` (String) Time unit for check_interval. One of "seconds", "minutes", "hours", or "days".
- `domain` (String) The fully qualified domain name (FQDN) to keep updated.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable or disable this DDNS service entry.
- `force_interval` (Number) Force an update even if the IP address has not changed, expressed in force_unit units.
- `force_unit` (String) Time unit for force_interval. One of "seconds", "minutes", "hours", or "days".
- `interface` (String) Network interface to monitor for IP changes (e.g. "wan"). An update is triggered when this interface comes up or its address changes.
- `ip_network` (String) Network interface to read the current IP address from. Used when ip_source is "network".
- `ip_script` (String) Path to a script that outputs the current IP address on stdout. Used when ip_source is "script".
- `ip_source` (String) How to detect the current public IP address: "network" (read from a local interface), "web" (query an external URL), or "script" (run a custom script).
- `ip_url` (String) URL of an external service that returns the current public IP address (e.g. "https://api4.my-ip.io/ip"). Used when ip_source is "web".
- `lookup_host` (String) Hostname used for DNS lookup to verify the currently registered IP. Defaults to the value of domain when unset.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password or API token for the DDNS provider.
- `retry_count` (Number) Number of times to retry a failed update before giving up and waiting for the next check cycle.
- `retry_interval` (Number) How long to wait between retries, expressed in retry_unit units.
- `retry_unit` (String) Time unit for retry_interval. One of "seconds", "minutes", "hours", or "days".
- `service_name` (String) DDNS provider to use (e.g. "cloudflare.com", "no-ip.com", "dyndns.org"). Use "--custom--" together with update_url for a provider not in the built-in list.
- `update_script` (String) Path to a custom script that performs the DDNS update. Used instead of the built-in provider logic.
- `update_url` (String) Custom update URL template used with service_name "--custom--". Placeholders like [USERNAME], [PASSWORD], [DOMAIN], and [IP] are substituted at runtime.
- `use_https` (Boolean) Use HTTPS when communicating with the DDNS provider.
- `use_ipv6` (Boolean) Update the IPv6 AAAA record instead of the IPv4 A record.
- `use_logfile` (Boolean) Write update activity to a dedicated log file.
- `use_syslog` (Number) Syslog verbosity level. 0 = disabled, 1–4 = increasing verbosity.
- `username` (String, Sensitive) Username or account identifier for the DDNS provider.
